name: proof-routing
description: Codex-native routing for Mathematical Proof CLI via local MCP tools.

interface.shortDescription: Route proof work to local Proof CLI tools.
interface.longDescription: Adds Codex-native tools for Proof CLI so theorem, obligation, blocker, retrieval, diagnostics, and snapshot workflows can run through a local MCP server instead of only skill prose.
defaultPrompt: Inspect my current proof workspace state.
Create a theorem and add its obligations.
